action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 26 trained 4-layer DKT (hidden=512, embed=256, dropout=0.4) for 60 epochs, val_auc=0.8985, lower than previous best 0.9498 from 3-layer arch. Analysis: Deeper model with high dropout underperformed. Previous 3-layer DKT (embed=256, hidden=512, dropout=0.3) yielded 0.9498 in 40 epochs. The simpler architecture generalizes better. Time remaining ~0.42h, 4 iterations left. Decision: Revert to proven 3-layer DKT, train longer (100 epochs) with same hyperparams, submit eval immediately to update test AUC. If improvement, next iterations can fine-tune or extend training.
